definitions.trajectory_regime: DTW-KMedoids dynamic regimes with year-by-year prefix matching
definitions.regime_network_features: Markov regime graph features: forward stall risk, self-transition persistence, transition entropy
definitions.continent_calibration: Adaptive continent-prior calibration with validation-year objective selection
definitions.uncertainty_quantification: Split-conformal interval for stall probability (target coverage 90%)
definitions.dynamic_structure: Ten-layer dynamics: kinetic state + critical transition + transition hazard + graph diffusion + risk fusion + global cycle + phase portrait + dynamic pulse index + policy/event lab + offline RL policy layer
definitions.dynamic_pulse_index: Dynamic city pulse index combining risk level, acceleration level, risk/acceleration velocity, and structural stability
definitions.policy_offline_rl: Offline fitted Q-iteration over city transitions with state-aware counterfactual action effects
definitions.multi_horizon_forecast: Markov regime-propagation forecast for 1Y/2Y/3Y stall risk
definitions.quadrant_rule: Data-adaptive thresholds by latest-year quantiles: low=Q35, high=Q65 for risk/acceleration
